column1: # Example wide Gibbs-energy seed file for the validation case.
# Values are standard-state Gibbs free energies (J/mol) for aqueous/liquid species
# obtained from the public CHNOSZ database via pyCHNOSZ.subcrt(property="G").
# Column headers are Cantera species names; the first column is temperature in Kelvin.
# This file demonstrates the SEED_CACHE_FROM_EXISTING_WIDE_CSV path so the example
# runs end-to-end without pyCHNOSZ installed. Replace with your own data as needed.
